Callers: Manta + Delly + GRIDSS + Scramble + MELT + SvABA + STRling. Single-caller DUP/INV excluded. gnomAD-SV v2.1 AF >1% flagged with badge (soft annotation).

Copy Number Variant (CNV) Summary
Total CNVs327
Deletions (DEL)2
Duplications (DUP)325
Both-caller consensus (HIGH)0
GATK-only (MEDIUM)2

BOTH = CNVpytor + GATK gCNV (reciprocal overlap ≥50%). MEDIUM = GATK gCNV quality ≥30, single caller. CNVs are research-grade: no orthogonal truth set and no per-call gene annotation. CNVs overlapping a known recurrent syndrome region are promoted to Clinical Findings above; the full list of 327 CNVs is in the companion .variants.xlsx.
